title: psoralea trinervata
intro: Psoralea trinervata, also known as Three-veined psoralea, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psoralea trinervata include its ability to improve skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and psoriasis, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Psoralea trinervata is often made into a tea, tincture, or topical cream, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine for its anti-aging and anti-inflammatory properties.
